title: Rainbow Kitchen frozen pies
body: Rainbow Kitchen frozen pies are $9.52 each. May the pie be with you! Special runs through June.

title: Organic onion pricing
body: Red onions $8.90/kg and brown onions $7.90/kg. We're hoping to continue offering them at these prices.

title: Perfectly ripe bananas
body: Perfectly ripe bananas $4.72/kg while stock lasts.

title: Winter Saturday hours
body: Saturdays we are now open 10am to 2pm. Same great service, same wonderful products.

title: Heritage apples
body: All apples $2.90/kg. Local heritage varieties — helping you eat well and affordably.

title: Organic Agria potatoes
body: Organic Agria potatoes only $4/kg for the week or while stock lasts.
